name: PlayStation Games
description: Sony PlayStation — consoles, exclusives, and iconic characters

questions.q: PlayStation consoles are manufactured by which company?

source.notes: Sony Interactive Entertainment has owned the brand since the PS1 launch in 1994.

questions.q: On a classic PlayStation controller, what color is the 'X' button?

source.notes: Green triangle, red circle, pink square, blue X.

questions.q: Nathan Drake is the protagonist of which action-adventure video-game series?

source.notes: Developed by Naughty Dog; first game released 2007.

questions.q: Kratos is the violent anti-hero of which PlayStation-exclusive franchise?

source.notes: Developed by Santa Monica Studio; first game 2005.

questions.q: What are the accomplishments you earn in PlayStation games called?

source.notes: Bronze, silver, gold, and platinum tiers.

questions.q: How many shape-labelled face buttons are on a standard PlayStation controller?

source.notes: Triangle, circle, X, square.

questions.q: What is the name of the PlayStation handheld that launched in 2004?

source.notes: PlayStation Portable; succeeded by the Vita in 2011/12.

questions.q: Who is the main playable character in 'Grand Theft Auto IV'?

source.notes: An Eastern European immigrant in fictional Liberty City.

questions.q: How many playable protagonists does 'Grand Theft Auto V' feature?

source.notes: Michael, Franklin, and Trevor.

questions.q: Spyro, the PlayStation platformer mascot, is what kind of creature?

source.notes: A small purple dragon; debuted 1998 on PS1.

questions.q: Who is the white-haired demon-hunting protagonist of the 'Devil May Cry' series?

source.notes: Developed by Capcom; first released 2001 on PS2.

questions.q: In the 'Uncharted' series, what is the name of Nathan Drake's grizzled mentor-turned-partner?

source.notes: Voiced by Richard McGonagle; played by Mark Wahlberg in the 2022 film.

questions.q: What is the name of the evil megacorporation in 'Final Fantasy VII'?

source.notes: Controls the planet's energy through mako reactors.

questions.q: Who is the master assassin protagonist of the very first 'Assassin's Creed' game (2007)?

source.notes: Set during the Third Crusade in 1191.

questions.q: In 'Alien: Isolation', you play as the daughter of Ellen Ripley. What is her first name?

source.notes: Set about 15 years after the original 'Alien' film.

questions.q: The 'Kingdom Hearts' video game series blends Square Enix characters with characters from which company?

source.notes: First game released 2002 on PS2.

questions.q: What color was the original PlayStation (PS1) console, released in 1994?

source.notes: Re-designed as the slimline 'PSone' in 2000.

questions.q: In the 'Watch Dogs' franchise, what is the name of the hacktivist group that the player joins?

source.notes: Oppose corporate surveillance network 'ctOS'.

questions.q: Which American studio, owned by Sony, developed the 'Uncharted' and 'The Last of Us' franchises?

source.notes: Founded 1984; also made the Crash Bandicoot and Jak and Daxter series.

questions.q: In which year did Sony launch the original PlayStation console in Japan?

source.notes: December 3, 1994 in Japan; 1995 in North America and Europe.

questions.q: Which PlayStation console is the best-selling home video game console of all time?

source.notes: PS2 has sold over 155 million units since its 2000 launch.

questions.q: Which recurring summoned dragon is known as the 'King of Dragons' in the Final Fantasy series?

source.notes: Named after the cosmic fish of Arabic mythology.
